claims.text: Zero-shot text classification can eliminate costly task-specific annotation by matching texts directly to human-readable label descriptions
claims.source_quote: Zero-shot text classification (ZSC) offers the promise of eliminating costly task-specific annotation by matching texts directly to human-readable label descriptions.

claims.text: BTZSC is a benchmark comprising 22 public datasets across sentiment, topic, intent, and emotion classification
claims.source_quote: we introduce BTZSC, a comprehensive benchmark of 22 public datasets spanning sentiment, topic, intent, and emotion classification

claims.text: The benchmark captures diverse domains, class cardinalities, and document lengths
claims.source_quote: capturing diverse domains, class cardinalities, and document lengths

claims.text: The study compared 38 public and custom checkpoints across four model families
claims.source_quote: we conduct a systematic comparison across four major model families, NLI cross-encoders, embedding models, rerankers and instruction-tuned LLMs, encompassing 38 public and custom checkpoints

claims.text: Qwen3-Reranker-8B achieved a macro F1 score of 0.72, setting a new state-of-the-art
claims.source_quote: modern rerankers, exemplified by Qwen3-Reranker-8B, set a new state-of-the-art with macro F1 = 0.72

claims.text: GTE-large-en-v1.5 substantially closes the accuracy gap while offering the best trade-off between accuracy and latency
claims.source_quote: strong embedding models such as GTE-large-en-v1.5 substantially close the accuracy gap while offering the best trade-off between accuracy and latency

claims.text: Instruction-tuned LLMs at 4-12B parameters achieve competitive performance with macro F1 up to 0.67
claims.source_quote: instruction-tuned LLMs at 4--12B parameters achieve competitive performance (macro F1 up to 0.67)

claims.text: Instruction-tuned LLMs excel particularly on topic classification
claims.source_quote: instruction-tuned LLMs... excelling particularly on topic classification

claims.text: NLI cross-encoders plateau in performance even as backbone size increases
claims.source_quote: NLI cross-encoders plateau even as backbone size increases

claims.text: Scaling primarily benefits rerankers and LLMs more than embedding models
claims.source_quote: scaling primarily benefits rerankers and LLMs over embedding models
